meta_title: For Founders: portfolio building to Solve no project ideas (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to portfolio building and overcome no project ideas. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Portfolio Building to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Stop hunting for ideas. Learn how to build a high-conversion portfolio using Antigravity and Claude Code to attract paying customers and solve analysis paralysis.
content.answer_block: Stop chasing 'perfect' ideas. Instead, build a portfolio of micro-SaaS prototypes that solve specific, high-friction pain points for existing workflows. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative refinement, you transform abstract concepts into tangible, revenue-generating assets that prove your competence to potential buyers.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of ambition. You have the technical stack, the ambition, and the hunger, yet you remain paralyzed by the 'idea drought.' This isn't a failure of creativity; it's a failure of framework. You are looking for a lightning-strike moment when you should be building a lightning rod.

True founders don't wait for inspiration; they engineer it through systematic portfolio building. By shifting your focus from 'The Next Big Thing' to 'The Next High-Value Tool,' you turn your development process into a lead-generation machine. Let's dismantle the paralysis and build assets that demand a market response.

steps.title: Identify High-Value Friction Points
steps.description: Analyze recurring complaints in niche subreddits or SaaS communities. Focus on boring, unsexy problems that businesses already pay to solve.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a market researcher. Analyze the following problem statement [Insert Problem] and propose 3 micro-SaaS features that would save a business at least 2 hours of manual labor per week.

steps.title: Scaffold the MVP Architecture
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate a clean, scalable starter codebase. Do not over-engineer; focus on a single core feature.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust Next.js/Supabase starter template optimized for a [Tool Type] application. Include authentication, Stripe checkout, and a clean UI layout.

steps.title: Implement Core Logic with Claude Code
steps.description: Use Claude Code to write the high-leverage logic. Let the AI handle the boilerplate so you can focus on the unique value proposition.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a clean, testable service layer for [Feature]. Ensure it handles edge cases and follows industry best practices for security and performance.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'implement service layer for user-dashboard-analytics'

steps.title: Automate Deployment and Distribution
steps.description: Configure your CI/CD pipeline so your project is live in under 30 minutes. A prototype in a repo is worthless; a live URL is a portfolio piece.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for automated deployment to Vercel, including linting and basic unit tests.

steps.title: Construct the 'Founder's Portfolio' Page
steps.description: Package your project into a high-conversion landing page that highlights the business impact, not just the code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a landing page copy that highlights the 'Before/After' state for the user. Focus on ROI and speed-to-value.

pro_tips: Build for the 'Boring' market: High-ticket B2B SaaS is easier to sell than consumer apps.
Ship the 'Waitlist' first: If nobody signs up for a landing page, don't write the code.
Audit your own workflow: The best SaaS ideas are tools you wish you had for your own development process.
Keep it ugly: If the core value is high, users will forgive a default tailwind theme.
The 24-hour rule: If you can't build a functional MVP in 24 hours, the scope is too large.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is live, treat the repository as a living asset. Document your development journey on X or LinkedIn to attract potential users and collaborators immediately.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the perfect moment. Your first project is the only thing standing between you and your first dollar. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
